# TableSeatingPlannerFitted

## Summary

The compact card format for the Table Seating Planner: a dark navy tile showing the event title (falling back to "Seating Plan") over two stats — table count and seated/total guests, with the seated count de-duplicated across tables. It applies the linked theme's CSS variables inline, and a container query hides the stats row when the tile is 70px tall or shorter so tiny strips still read cleanly.

## Import

```js
import { TableSeatingPlannerFitted } from '../components/tsp';
```

## Template Usage

Not typically invoked directly — the card definition assigns it as both the fitted and embedded formats in `table-seating-planner.gts`:

```js
TableSeatingPlanner.embedded = TableSeatingPlannerFitted;
TableSeatingPlanner.fitted = TableSeatingPlannerFitted;
```
